Best CSS Resources

Here is a curated list of the resources I personally recommend for learning CSS, each with a note on why it is worth your time and how to get the most out of it as you go from beginner to confident practitioner.

  • MDN CSS — the canonical reference; start here when you need precise, accurate behavior of any property or selector.
  • CSS Tricks — practical guides and real-world patterns explained with worked examples and live demos you can copy.
  • Specificity Calculator — a small tool that makes the cascade tangible the moment your selectors get complicated.

Each of these has genuinely shaped how I write stylesheets, and I revisit them constantly as the platform keeps evolving year over year.
